name: yamgam
one_liner: A hub of ten single-file browser math games for middle schoolers, disguised as pure games — no accounts, no installs, no visible schoolwork.
next: Publish the hub somewhere students can reach it

components.name: Between
components.one_liner: Daily puzzle: fit a fraction between two numbers, five rounds deep — rational density in disguise.

components.name: Estimation Golf
components.one_liner: 9-hole golf where the clubs are operations (×9, +47, ×½, ²) — operational number sense.

components.name: Zoom
components.one_liner: Infinite-zoom number line dive — place value, decimals, and irrational bosses.

components.name: Sonar
components.one_liner: Ping spatially, fire by typed coordinates — four-quadrant graphing as a ship hunt.

components.name: The Chocolate Shop
components.one_liner: Slice-by-eye fractions tycoon in Grandma Pearl's chocolate shop.

components.name: The Ramen Cat
components.one_liner: Ratio-and-percent ramen counter with Tonko the talking cat — recipes are ratio tables.

components.name: Blind Builder
components.one_liner: Asymmetric co-op: one sees the blueprint, one builds, messages go by pigeon — precise communication under a word budget.

components.name: Rewind
components.one_liner: Evidence-based sequencing mystery — read the scene backwards, stamp the true order of events.

components.name: Family Tree Detective
components.one_liner: Cozy deduction campaign — rebuild families from letters and ledgers; transitive inference in a records office.

components.name: The Cartographer's Apprentice
components.one_liner: Turn travelers' spoken 'on my left' testimony into a top-down map — perspective-taking and spatial orientation.
